sign_out.title: Sign Out
sign_out.description: Sign out of only the selected server, or disconnect every server from this client.

server_gutter.compatibility_degraded: Some live features are unavailable on this server.
server_gutter.compatibility_server_too_old: This server is running an older version. Some features may not work as expected.
server_gutter.compatibility_client_too_old: This app is too old for this server. Refresh or update it.
server_gutter.compatibility_unsupported: This server does not support the protocols required by this app.
server_gutter.compatibility_unknown: This server does not report compatibility information.

threads.title: My Threads
threads.subtitle: Threads you're following
threads.empty_body: Threads you follow will appear here. You automatically follow threads you participate in.
